title: Dust & Ore: Raw Ore Expansion
description: A Minecraft Addon mod that converts ancient debris and diamond ores (normal and deepslate) into raw materials, which can then be crushed into dusts to deepen and extend your ore-processing progression - Required Dust & Ore Mod.
body:
# Dust & Ore: Raw Ore Expansion
A Minecraft Addon mod that converts **Ancient Debris** and **Diamond Ores** (normal and deepslate) into raw materials, which can then be crushed into dusts to deepen and extend your ore-processing progression - Required [**Dust & Ore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dust-and-ores) Mod.

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-JOIN-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/6NJZSxXFPV) [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-SUPPORT-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/bobotweaks) [![Fiverr](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fiverr-HIRE%20ME-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=fiverr&logoColor=white)](https://www.fiverr.com/s/1qZlPl6)

![gif](https://i.ibb.co/Xf3VTJqb/showcase-gif.gif)

## **What's New?**

**Precious Raw Materials**
- **Raw Diamond** - Obtain from **Diamond Ore** instead of finished **Diamonds**
- **Raw Netherite Scrap** - Mine **Ancient Debris** to get **Raw Netherite Scrap**
---
**New Processing Options**
- **Smelt Raw Materials**: **Raw Diamond** → **Diamond** | **Raw Netherite Scrap** → **Netherite Scrap**
- **Crush into Dust**: Process raw materials using **Crushing Hammers** from [**Dust & Ore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dust-and-ores) Mod
- **Smelt Dusts**: **Diamond Dust** → **Diamond** | **Netherite Scrap Dust** → **Netherite Scrap**
